extDescription.message: Per-site font override with a system-font picker.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Edge Add-ons store and in edge://extensions.

enableForSite.description: Label next to the on/off checkbox in the popup.

fontLabel.description: Label above the font dropdown in the popup.

customFontLabel.description: Label above the free-text input shown when the user picks 'Custom…'.

customFontPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text inside the custom-font text input.

customOption.description: Last entry in the font dropdown that reveals the free-text input.

notAvailable.description: Shown when the popup opens on a tab without a usable URL (e.g. edge://… pages).
